pub load_redpikmin_sprites()   'call this method from main to load sprites
	debug(`screen spritedef 0 16 16 `uhex_byte_array_(@redpikmin_0, 256) `uhex_long_array_(@redpikmin_0_colors, 43))
	debug(`screen spritedef 1 16 16 `uhex_byte_array_(@redpikmin_1, 256) `uhex_long_array_(@redpikmin_1_colors, 42))
	debug(`screen spritedef 2 16 16 `uhex_byte_array_(@redpikmin_2, 256) `uhex_long_array_(@redpikmin_2_colors, 55))
	debug(`screen spritedef 3 16 16 `uhex_byte_array_(@redpikmin_3, 256) `uhex_long_array_(@redpikmin_3_colors, 36))

dat redpikmin_tiles byte {
}0,	1,	{
}2,	3

con 'redpikmin sprites
dat redpikmin_0 byte {
}$00,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$02,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$03,$04,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$01,$05,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$01,$06,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$07,$08,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$09,$0a,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$0b,$0c,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$0d,$0e,$0f,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$10,$11,$12,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$01,$13,$14,$15,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$16,$17,$18,$19,$1a,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$01,$1b,$1c,$1d,$1e,$1f,$20,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$01,$21,$22,$23,$24,$25,$26,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$01,$27,$28,$29,$25,$2a,$25,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00{
}
redpikmin_0_colors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x0  -  0
}%11111111_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x1  -  1
}%11111111_01010111_00100110_00011111,{ 'index=0x2  -  2
}%11111111_01010101_00010100_00010010,{ 'index=0x3  -  3
}%11111111_01101011_00110000_00101101,{ 'index=0x4  -  4
}%11111111_01110001_00101010_00101010,{ 'index=0x5  -  5
}%11111111_01011111_00110001_00101011,{ 'index=0x6  -  6
}%11111111_00101000_00001000_00000000,{ 'index=0x7  -  7
}%11111111_00111000_00001101_00001111,{ 'index=0x8  -  8
}%11111111_00010101_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x9  -  9
}%11111111_01100011_00100001_00100101,{ 'index=0xa  -  10
}%11111111_00100001_00000011_00000000,{ 'index=0xb  -  11
}%11111111_01101010_00010111_00011011,{ 'index=0xc  -  12
}%11111111_00110011_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0xd  -  13
}%11111111_01100111_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0xe  -  14
}%11111111_00101110_00001101_00001110,{ 'index=0xf  -  15
}%11111111_00101010_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x10  -  16
}%11111111_01111101_00001011_00001000,{ 'index=0x11  -  17
}%11111111_01001001_00100100_00100101,{ 'index=0x12  -  18
}%11111111_01111000_00100101_00101001,{ 'index=0x13  -  19
}%11111111_10010000_00001011_00000111,{ 'index=0x14  -  20
}%11111111_01101010_00100001_00100011,{ 'index=0x15  -  21
}%11111111_01100000_00001010_00001010,{ 'index=0x16  -  22
}%11111111_11101000_01101011_01101010,{ 'index=0x17  -  23
}%11111111_11001101_00101001_00100111,{ 'index=0x18  -  24
}%11111111_10100100_00011001_00011011,{ 'index=0x19  -  25
}%11111111_01010101_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x1a  -  26
}%11111111_11010001_01101011_01101000,{ 'index=0x1b  -  27
}%11111111_11010111_00111001_00110110,{ 'index=0x1c  -  28
}%11111111_11111111_01010010_01001100,{ 'index=0x1d  -  29
}%11111111_11011011_00110000_00101000,{ 'index=0x1e  -  30
}%11111111_11001110_00010001_00010111,{ 'index=0x1f  -  31
}%11111111_11001100_00100101_00101111,{ 'index=0x20  -  32
}%11111111_10010111_00001011_00001010,{ 'index=0x21  -  33
}%11111111_11010101_00100010_00011111,{ 'index=0x22  -  34
}%11111111_11100111_00110100_00101101,{ 'index=0x23  -  35
}%11111111_11110001_01101110_01100001,{ 'index=0x24  -  36
}%11111111_01111000_01111000_01111000,{ 'index=0x25  -  37
}%11111111_10110011_00011001_00011111,{ 'index=0x26  -  38
}%11111111_10111010_00000110_00001001,{ 'index=0x27  -  39
}%11111111_10110101_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x28  -  40
}%11111111_10111110_00100101_00011101,{ 'index=0x29  -  41
}%11111111_11111111_11111111_11111111{ 'index=0x2a  -  42
}

redpikmin_1 byte {
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$01,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$01,$02,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$03,$04,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$05,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$06,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$07,$08,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$09,$0a,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$0b,$0c,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$0d,$0e,$0f,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$10,$11,$12,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$01,$13,$14,$15,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$16,$17,$18,$19,$1a,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$01,$1b,$1c,$1d,$01,$1e,$1f,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$01,$20,$21,$22,$23,$01,$24,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$01,$25,$26,$27,$28,$29,$01,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00{
}
redpikmin_1_colors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x0  -  0
}%11111111_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x1  -  1
}%11111111_01010111_00100110_00011111,{ 'index=0x2  -  2
}%11111111_01101011_00110000_00101101,{ 'index=0x3  -  3
}%11111111_01010101_00010100_00010010,{ 'index=0x4  -  4
}%11111111_01110001_00101010_00101010,{ 'index=0x5  -  5
}%11111111_01011111_00110001_00101011,{ 'index=0x6  -  6
}%11111111_00111000_00001101_00001111,{ 'index=0x7  -  7
}%11111111_00101000_00001000_00000000,{ 'index=0x8  -  8
}%11111111_01100011_00100001_00100101,{ 'index=0x9  -  9
}%11111111_00010101_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0xa  -  10
}%11111111_01101010_00010111_00011011,{ 'index=0xb  -  11
}%11111111_00100001_00000011_00000000,{ 'index=0xc  -  12
}%11111111_00101110_00001101_00001110,{ 'index=0xd  -  13
}%11111111_01100111_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0xe  -  14
}%11111111_00110011_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0xf  -  15
}%11111111_01001001_00100100_00100101,{ 'index=0x10  -  16
}%11111111_01111101_00001011_00001000,{ 'index=0x11  -  17
}%11111111_00101010_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x12  -  18
}%11111111_01111000_00100101_00101001,{ 'index=0x13  -  19
}%11111111_10010000_00001011_00000111,{ 'index=0x14  -  20
}%11111111_01101010_00100001_00100011,{ 'index=0x15  -  21
}%11111111_01100000_00001010_00001010,{ 'index=0x16  -  22
}%11111111_11101000_01101011_01101010,{ 'index=0x17  -  23
}%11111111_11001101_00101001_00100111,{ 'index=0x18  -  24
}%11111111_10100100_00011001_00011011,{ 'index=0x19  -  25
}%11111111_01010101_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x1a  -  26

redpikmin_2 byte {
}$01,$02,$02,$02,$03,$04,$03,$02,$04,$04,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$04,$05,$06,$07,$02,$03,$02,$08,$09,$04,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$0a,$0b,$0c,$0d,$0e,$0f,$10,$04,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$11,$12,$13,$14,$15,$16,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$17,$18,$19,$1a,$1b,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$1c,$1d,$1e,$1f,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$20,$21,$22,$23,$24,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$25,$26,$04,$27,$28,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$04,$29,$04,$04,$2a,$2b,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$04,$2c,$2d,$2e,$2f,$30,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$04,$31,$32,$33,$34,$04,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{

}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x0  -  0

}%11111111_01000010_00001101_00001001,{ 'index=0x25  -  37

redpikmin_3 byte {
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$01,$01,$02,$02,$03,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$01,$01,$02,$03,$03,$04,$05,$01,$01,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$01,$01,$05,$03,$00,$00,$01,$01,$01,$01,$01,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$03,$04,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$02,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$06,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$07,$08,$09,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$0a,$0b,$0c,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$01,$0d,$0e,$0f,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$10,$11,$12,$13,$14,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$01,$15,$16,$17,$01,$18,$19,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$01,$1a,$1b,$1c,$1d,$01,$1e,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$01,$1f,$20,$21,$22,$23,$01,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00{
}

}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x0  -  0
}%11111111_00000000_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x1  -  1

}%11111111_01101011_00110000_00101101,{ 'index=0x3  -  3
}%11111111_01010101_00010100_00010010,{ 'index=0x4  -  4
}%11111111_01010111_00100110_00011111,{ 'index=0x5  -  5
}%11111111_01011111_00110001_00101011,{ 'index=0x6  -  6
}%11111111_00101110_00001101_00001110,{ 'index=0x7  -  7
}%11111111_01100111_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x8  -  8
}%11111111_00110011_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0x9  -  9
}%11111111_01001001_00100100_00100101,{ 'index=0xa  -  10
}%11111111_01111101_00001011_00001000,{ 'index=0xb  -  11
}%11111111_00101010_00000000_00000000,{ 'index=0xc  -  12
}%11111111_01111000_00100101_00101001,{ 'index=0xd  -  13
}%11111111_10010000_00001011_00000111,{ 'index=0xe  -  14
}%11111111_01101010_00100001_00100011,{ 'index=0xf  -  15
}%11111111_01100000_00001010_00001010,{ 'index=0x10  -  16
}%11111111_11101000_01101011_01101010,{ 'index=0x11  -  17
}%11111111_11001101_00101001_00100111,{ 'index=0x12  -  18
}%11111111_10100100_00011001_00011011,{ 'index=0x13  -  19

}%11111111_11111111_11111111_11111111{ 'index=0x23  -  35
}
